title: Assistant Store Manager - Om Book Shop - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Om Book Shop - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Om Book Shop in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
